hero.tagline: Amazing lips, unique look, radiant skin.
hero.title: Welcome to Sawsan Madi Clinic
hero.description: Improve your look naturally to reveal your beauty and natural glow.

about.title: Beyond the surface
about.description: We believe true skin health goes deeper than quick fixes. Our clinic combines medical expertise with advanced aesthetic technology to treat the root cause of your skin concerns. Every treatment is tailored to your unique biology.

doctor.title: Meet your skin specialist
doctor.description1: Led by Dr. Sawsan Madi, our team brings decades of combined medical experience to your aesthetic journey.
doctor.description2: We specialize in natural-looking results that enhance your unique features while prioritizing your long-term skin health.
doctor.name: Dr. Sawsan Madi

acne.title: Acne & skin health
acne.description: Personalized dermatology care for acne, pigmentation, and long-term skin maintenance.

botox.title: Botox & fillers
botox.description: Subtle enhancements that refresh your features without changing who you are. Stop age counter and stay young. Draw your lips the way you like.
benefits: Restores Volume and Get Your Amazing Lips Back

laser.title: Laser treatments
laser.description: Advanced laser solutions for hair removal, pigmentation, texture, and scars — clinical laser solutions.

antiaging.title: Anti-aging solutions
antiaging.description: Target lines, volume loss, dullness, and tired skin with safe, proven treatments.

prp.title: PRP therapy
prp.description: Platelet-rich plasma treatments to stimulate collagen production and accelerate healing.

hair_growth.title: Hair growth treatments
hair_growth.description: Advanced solutions to stimulate hair follicles, reduce thinning, and promote healthy, fuller hair growth.

body_sculpting.title: Body sculpting treatments
body_sculpting.description: Non-invasive body contouring solutions to target stubborn fat, tone muscles, and refine your silhouette.

stem_cell.title: Stem cell & PDRN treatments
stem_cell.description: Cutting-edge regenerative therapies using PDRN and stem cells to rejuvenate skin at a cellular level.

salmon.title: Salmon DNA (Rejuran) treatments
salmon.description: Deeply hydrating and repairing skin boosters derived from Salmon DNA to restore skin barrier and youthful elasticity.

results.title: Care that puts you first
results.tailoredDesc: Customized treatment plans for every skin type and concern.

cta.title: Ready for perfect, voluminous lips?
cta.description: Enhancing lip volume is one of our signature specialties. Book your consultation today and let our experts craft a customized treatment plan for beautifully natural, full lips.

founderHero.title: A vision for beauty standards and confidence look.
founderHero.description: "I built Sawsan Madi Clinic because I believe true beauty comes from within. My mission is to empower you with the knowledge and treatments to feel confident in your own skin, every single day."

founderStory.title: My idea to better presence of beauty.
founderStory.p1: We are constantly adopting new technology to fulfill the highest standards of beauty. By providing top-of-the-line materials and utilizing advanced techniques, we ensure our patients achieve the best possible results.
founderStory.p2: Safety and quality are our top priorities. We make sure to strictly adhere to approved materials and protocols mandated by Kuwait's Ministry of Health, maintaining the absolute highest standards in the dermatology and aesthetic field.
founderStory.p3: Our commitment goes beyond just using the best tools. We believe that true beauty is built on a foundation of trust, medical precision, and continuous innovation. Every treatment is designed to enhance your natural features while ensuring your complete well-being.
founderStory.p4: Welcome to a clinic where aesthetic excellence meets rigorous medical standards. We are dedicated to providing you with a safe, effective, and transformative experience.

mission.title: Credentials & Philosophy
mission.boardDesc: Completed extensive medical training and residency in dermatology. She is dedicated to advancing the field of aesthetic medicine and actively contributes to pioneering research in laser therapeutics.
mission.provenExpDesc: With over a decade of hands-on clinical practice and continuous international training, Dr. Sawsan has cultivated an exceptional track record in advanced dermatological procedures and cosmetic enhancements.
mission.quote: "Skin health is not about achieving an impossible standard of perfection. It's about restoring balance, enhancing your natural features, and giving you the quiet confidence to show up authentically in the world."

footer.description: Advanced dermatology and aesthetic treatments for clear, healthy skin.
footer.bottomline: Advanced dermatology for your unique skin.

contactPage.title: Book a Consultation
contactPage.description: Take the first step toward radiant, healthy skin. Fill out the form below or reach out to us directly.
